violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Per PIC, service will be called. Establishment will use chlorine until sanitizer dispenser is serviced and reaches the proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed and continue to work with pest control to eliminate fly problem. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler and back prep area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced roll. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Single use items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Such items should be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Walk-in cooler located in the kitchen area was not in good repair (leak observed at fan unit). New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -all food prep areas, -storage shelves, -refrigeration units under coffee taps, -walk-in cooler fan blades, -2 door ovens. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Handwash sink located behind display counter was observed to be leaking at the faucet. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
An air gap is lacking at the ice machine (currently an air break). New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors throughout the facility (including walk-in cooler/freezer) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The wall in the oven area is in poor repair (hole observed). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The cutting boards in the preparation area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
Handwash sink located behind display counter was observed to be leaking at the faucet. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of brown/black residue. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The floors and walls in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023
